auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Amplemarket API key used as a Bearer token. Create or view it in the Amplemarket Dashboard under Settings > API: https://docs.amplemarket.com/guides/quickstart.

actions.name: complete_task
actions.description: Mark an Amplemarket task as completed.

inputSchema.description: Path parameters for updating an Amplemarket task.

anyOf.description: Task due timestamp in ISO 8601 format.
LinkedIn profile URL of the contact.
Owner email or identifier for the contact.
Last contacted timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

is_wrong_number.description: Whether the number is marked as wrong.

is_dnc_listed.description: Whether the number is on a DNC list when available.

items.description: Phone number attached to an Amplemarket contact.

phone_numbers.description: Phone numbers attached to the contact.

items.description: Recent activity returned for an Amplemarket contact.

lead.description: Lead or prospect object attached to the task.

sequence.description: Sequence object attached to the task.

actions.name: get_account_details
actions.description: Get account details for the authenticated Amplemarket API key.

inputSchema.description: This action does not require any input fields.

actions.name: get_contact
actions.description: Retrieve an Amplemarket contact by contact ID.

inputSchema.description: Path parameters for retrieving an Amplemarket contact.

anyOf.description: LinkedIn profile URL of the contact.
Owner email or identifier for the contact.
Last contacted timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

is_wrong_number.description: Whether the number is marked as wrong.

is_dnc_listed.description: Whether the number is on a DNC list when available.

items.description: Phone number attached to an Amplemarket contact.

phone_numbers.description: Phone numbers attached to the contact.

items.description: Recent activity returned for an Amplemarket contact.

actions.name: get_contact_by_email
actions.description: Retrieve an Amplemarket contact by email address.

email.description: Email address of the Amplemarket contact.

inputSchema.description: Path parameters for retrieving an Amplemarket contact.

anyOf.description: LinkedIn profile URL of the contact.
Owner email or identifier for the contact.
Last contacted timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

is_wrong_number.description: Whether the number is marked as wrong.

is_dnc_listed.description: Whether the number is on a DNC list when available.

items.description: Phone number attached to an Amplemarket contact.

phone_numbers.description: Phone numbers attached to the contact.

items.description: Recent activity returned for an Amplemarket contact.

actions.name: get_lead_list
actions.description: Retrieve an Amplemarket lead list by ID.

inputSchema.description: Path parameters for retrieving an Amplemarket lead list.

url.description: Dashboard URL for the lead list.

shared.description: Whether the lead list is shared.

visible.description: Whether the lead list is visible.

created_at.description: Lead list creation timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

updated_at.description: Lead list update timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

actions.name: list_contacts
actions.description: Retrieve Amplemarket contacts by one or more contact IDs.

inputSchema.description: Query parameters for retrieving Amplemarket contacts by ID.

anyOf.description: LinkedIn profile URL of the contact.
Owner email or identifier for the contact.
Last contacted timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

is_wrong_number.description: Whether the number is marked as wrong.

is_dnc_listed.description: Whether the number is on a DNC list when available.

items.description: Phone number attached to an Amplemarket contact.

phone_numbers.description: Phone numbers attached to the contact.

items.description: Recent activity returned for an Amplemarket contact.

actions.name: list_lead_lists
actions.description: List Amplemarket lead lists with cursor pagination and owner filters.

page_size.description: Number of records to return in the page.

page_after.description: Cursor value from an Amplemarket pagination link.

page_before.description: Cursor value from an Amplemarket pagination link.

status.description: Lead list status to filter by.

owner_id.description: Lead list owner ID to filter by.

owner_email.description: Lead list owner email to filter by.

inputSchema.description: Query parameters for listing Amplemarket lead lists.

url.description: Dashboard URL for the lead list.

shared.description: Whether the lead list is shared.

visible.description: Whether the lead list is visible.

created_at.description: Lead list creation timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

updated_at.description: Lead list update timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

lead_lists.description: Items returned in the lead_lists page.

href.description: Relative URL for the related resource or page.
Relative URL for the related resource or page.
Relative URL for the related resource or page.

anyOf.description: Cursor to pass as page_after for the next page.
Cursor to pass as page_before for the previous page.

actions.name: list_task_statuses
actions.description: List task statuses supported by Amplemarket.

inputSchema.description: This action does not require any input fields.

actions.name: list_task_types
actions.description: List task types supported by Amplemarket.

inputSchema.description: This action does not require any input fields.

page_after.description: Cursor value from an Amplemarket pagination link.

page_before.description: Cursor value from an Amplemarket pagination link.

user_id.description: User ID to filter tasks by.

user_email.description: User email to filter tasks by.
